name: mimo-nscc-adapter
description: A powerful bridge for 5 MiMo & 1 NSCC models in Copilot Chat, supporting dual-protocol routing, vision proxy, and reasoning chain.

walkthroughs.title: MiMo & NSCC Copilot Bridge
walkthroughs.description: Set up MiMo and NSCC models in Copilot Chat.

steps.title: Set your MiMo API key
steps.description:
[Get a MiMo API key](https://api.xiaomimimo.com) from Xiaomi.
[Set MiMo API Key](command:mimo-nscc.setMimoApiKey)

steps.title: Set your NSCC API key
steps.description:
[Get an NSCC API key](https://maas.nscc-cs.cn).
[Set NSCC API Key](command:mimo-nscc.setNsccApiKey)

steps.title: Show MiMo / NSCC models
steps.description:
If the models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show the MiMo-NSCC models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)

mimo-nscc.mimoApiKey.description: API key for MiMo (Xiaomi). Stored in VS Code SecretStorage via 'Set MiMo API Key' command; use this field only for CI/automation fallback.

mimo-nscc.nsccApiKey.description: API key for NSCC. Stored in VS Code SecretStorage via 'Set NSCC API Key' command; use this field only for CI/automation fallback.

mimo-nscc.mimoModelId.description: API model ID for MiMo requests. Leave empty to use the model ID selected in the picker.

mimo-nscc.nsccModelId.description: API model ID sent for NSCC requests.

mimo-nscc.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to 0 to use the API default (no limit).

mimo-nscc.visionModel.description: Model ID for vision proxy. Leave empty for auto-detection. Use 'MiMo-NSCC: Set Vision Proxy Model' to pick from a list.

mimo-nscc.visionPrompt.default: Describe the visual contents of this image in detail, including any text, objects, people, or context that would be relevant for understanding it. Focus on factual visual elements.
mimo-nscc.visionPrompt.description: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments.
